name: MA'EN JUTSU: KAENRAKUIN (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: BLAZING BRAND)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 5

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 4

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, E, F, S

You carve sizzling runes into the palm of your hand, remaining dormant until activated as an attack action.

When activated, you make a melee touch attack that does not provoke attacks of opportunity. If the attack hits, this seal is discharged with a bright, fiery glow as it leaves a mark identical to the seal on the target for 1 day afterward. When you hit, you can consume one seal created by Ma'en Jutsu: En'mi that you have, dealing 2d6 fire damage. (CR applies) When you hit and consume seals, both this seal and any En'mi seals consumed fade.

This technique takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 2 damage when performing it.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and deal yourself 1 additional damage to consume an additional En'mi seal, adding another 2d6 damage.

Spend 4 Chakra to increase the damage dealt per En'mi seal consumed by 1d6 (up to 4d6 total per seal).
